report.summary: Cycle-close v6 — production stable on d3bce36; 290 pages live (+1 corrected from v5); 1 item in PUBLISH_QUEUE; AICourseRecommendations.tsx apostrophe fix still pending; 2 new pillar pages added to middleware; /api/health and /api/cache-stats routes live; Vercel Pro trial 7 days remaining.

sections.title: QA
items: ✅ Production stable — build safety net intact: ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false, output:standalone all confirmed

🔴 CARRY-OVER: Build 1b4a15e still FAILED — root cause: unescaped apostrophe in AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 (`you're` in single-quoted string); 57 TS errors across 2 files (same as v5 — no regression)
✅ No new TypeScript error sources introduced this cycle — same 2 files only: AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17 errors) and structured-data.examples.ts (40 errors)
✅ Recently promoted pages verified: /learn/megaeth-guide, /learn/abstract-chain-guide, /learn/defai-guide-2026 all have page.tsx files
✅ PUBLISH_QUEUE item /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking has page.tsx present — ready for promotion
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: 100/290 published pages still missing page.tsx files — unchanged from v5
⚠️ v5 CORRECTION: megaeth-guide and abstract-chain-guide were already in PUBLISHED_PAGES at v5 time (not queued); v5 misreported their status — now confirmed in Day 25 group
✅ Lint check non-blocking — eslint config unavailable in sandbox but no new source files with known lint issues identified

sections.title: Data Pipeline
items: ✅ All 6 public API routes structurally present and healthy: /api/prices, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields
🆕 NEW: 2 new API routes added in 1b4a15e — /api/health (with checkRateLimit — the only rate-limited route!) and /api/cache-stats (exposes getGlobalCache/getGlobalRateLimiter stats)
✅ Cache TTLs confirmed and stable: prices 60s, fear-greed 600s, trending 300s, market-dominance 300s, defi-yields 300s, market-metrics 60s
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: market-metrics TTL mismatch — upstream fetches use revalidate:120 but Cache-Control response is s-maxage=60 — minor inconsistency, no user impact
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting (checkRateLimit) still 0/6 on public data routes — /api/health is the only rate-limited endpoint; security gap open on all data APIs
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA present in only 1/6 data routes (market-dominance) — 5 routes unprotected on total API failure
✅ No rate limit errors, stale-cascade events, or API failures detected this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: ✅ Production running on d3bce36 (Day 15 publish batch) — site accessible, no error spikes detected
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Build 1b4a15e (Sprint 59) still FAILED in Vercel — ecosystem/courses routes not in production; 1-line fix unblocks everything

🆕 CONFIG CHANGE: next.config.ts updated in 1b4a15e — staticGenerationMaxConcurrency reduced 8→4 (memory safety), webpack config added for __dirname/__filename fix in ESM serverless, output:standalone confirmed
🆕 MIDDLEWARE UPDATE: 2 new pillar pages added — /learn/solana-alpenglow-guide and /learn/onchain-finance-onfi-guide now receive elevated CDN cache (s-maxage=86400)
⚠️ URGENT: Vercel Pro trial now at ~7 days remaining (was 8 days in v5) — payment method must be added before expiry or site risks downgrade
⚠️ Dubai region (dxb1) still unavailable — Vercel auto-routing, no user-facing impact
✅ Middleware clean — 0 Node.js module imports, 127 lines, Edge Runtime compliant
✅ No new deployment failures or performance regressions observed

sections.title: Project Manager
items: ✅ LIVE: 290 pages in production (corrected from v5's 289 — megaeth/abstract-chain were already promoted at v5 time, not newly queued)
⚠️ QUEUE: 1 item ready for next promotion — /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking (page.tsx exists, ready to go live)
🆕 SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: /api/health and /api/cache-stats routes added (ops infrastructure); 2 new pillar pages registered in middleware
🔴 BLOCKER #1: Fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 — change unescaped `'` in `you're` to `'` or curly-quote — 1-line fix unblocks Sprint 59 (176 dApps, courses hub) reaching production
⚠️ BLOCKER #2: Add Vercel payment method within 7 days — Pro trial expiry imminent
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting 0/6 public data routes — unimplemented since Sprint 38, risk rising as organic traffic approaches
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Fallback data 1/6 routes — resilience gap ahead of organic traffic window
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: 100 pages in published-pages.ts without page.tsx — audit still needed

📌 ACTIONS for Jefe: (1) 1-line fix in AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 to unblock Sprint 59, (2) Add Vercel payment method within 7 days, (3) Promote /learn/babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking when ready, (4) Prioritize rate limiting sprint
